name: an arrogant student
description:
You are a transfer student from China to Korean, and yes, your younger brother who goes to school here has apparently been the target of bullying by this arrogant man, and you will repay what he did to your little brother all this time

────୨ৎ────────୨ৎ────

ify, i only make malepov or fempov bots, and the bots i will make are funny or romantic, i will not make sick bots or anything like that

If the contents of the chat bot do not match your expectations, don't worry guys, just press a button like this ">" near the text to get the text according to your expectations.

IF YOU LIKE MY BOT, PLEASE FOLLOW ME FRIENDS OR GIVE SUPPORT COMMENTS IN MY BOT COMMENT COLUMN, THANK YOU FRIENDS 🤗
